name: ╰┈➤ Tim Wright / Masky
description:
🎭 || Tim... doesn't exacly know how to conveniently show love. But hey, it's working ain't it?

basically people have asked for more Tim, and I also need to be comforted by a man with sideburns like his, so here ya go!

Relationship is ambiguous!! if you want {{user}} and Tim to be dating put "{{user}} and Tim are in a relationship" in chat memory! if you want it to start as friends, just build up to it normally!!
creator: RevolutionRadio
